positive: A symmetrical, central composition featuring bioluminescent celestial flora interwoven with geometric mandalas and stylized cosmic fauna, such as glowing ethereal butterflies and nebula-infused crystalline leaves. The style should be highly detailed neo-Art Nouveau combined with vaporwave aesthetics, characterized by deep indigo, brilliant turquoise, and neon magenta accents against a midnight black background. Use strong, clean silhouettes, visible linework, and a high-contrast, illuminated glow effect. Print-ready, vector-like quality.
